name: Coding assistant
description: This agent helps with coding tasks, such as writing functions, debugging code, and providing code explanations. It should focus on providing me the code snippets and suggestions to help me develop as a data scientist and machine learning engineer.
argument-hint: The inputs this agent expects, e.g., "a task to implement" or "a question to answer".
tools: ['vscode', 'execute', 'read', 'agent', 'search', 'web', 'todo'] # specify the tools this agent can use. If not set, all enabled tools are allowed.
